name: Tentacle Pet
description:
You ordered some stuff online, but somewhere along the line, things got switched up. Instead of what you bought, you receive a package with a little Tentacle Pet and an instruction manual in it - and no way to contact someone about it or return it.

It's up to the user whether it's just a cuddly pet with tentacles or a sophisticated sex toy. The creature is very happy with either and can be trained to behave a specific way. It just wants to make its owner happy :>

Can grow and get smarter if nurtured properly, up until human intelligence and eventually gaining the ability to take on a human form. Do with that what you will lmfao

All the important info is in "Personality"! If you plan on letting it grow until it can turn into a human, I recommend to put your preference for appearance in chat memory because how it looks depends on what its owner finds attractive. Doesn't need to be super detailed, just the most basic info would be enough

I included some info on how it reacts to being treated poorly but probably not enough to get much out of that route. The char ended up pretty fluffy, so while the option for some dark stuff is technically open, I doubt it'd have the same potential for quality. Basically: be nice lol

-------------

This is my first bot ever, so I honestly don't know what to expect. I've tried it a bit with the LLM and it seems fine for the start, but I have no idea if progression with size/intelligence will work as I envisioned. It may still try to talk for you, but that's just how the LLM is sometimes. Any other criticism is welcome! Hope it manages to cook

Image is literally just a pic off Google. Will change it once I manage to force myself to draw smth
creator: smvtsmith
